entry.title: IDC W31P4Q17D0026 (P00010) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W0H9 US ARMY AVN & MISSLES CMD

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS CONTRACT IS IN SUPPORT OF THE PATRIOT ADVANCED CAPABILITY-3 (PAC-3) MISSILE SUPPORT CENTER (P3MSC) FOR THE UNITED STATES (US) AND FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS) CUSTOMERS.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER GUIDED MISSILE AND SPACE VEHICLE PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS CONTRACT IS IN SUPPORT OF THE PATRIOT ADVANCED CAPABILITY-3 (PAC-3) MISSILE SUPPORT CENTER (P3MSC) FOR THE UNITED STATES AND FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS). THIS MOD P00015 IS FOR REALIGNING 10,000 UNSCHEDULED MAINTENANCE HOURS (FROM 2017) FROM ONE SECTION OF THE PWS TO ANOTHER SECTION
